Dorothy Clifford
Posted 31 Jul 2021 by kyliepeachey

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Dorothy Clifford於1512年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓時，她的父親Sir Henry Clifford58歲，母親Florence Pudsey37歲。她於1529年與Hugh Lowther Knt.在英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1562年9月13日在英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Dorothy Clifford于1512年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯吉普頓时，她的父亲Sir Henry Clifford58岁，母亲Florence Pudsey37岁。她于1529年与Hugh Lowther Knt.在英国英格兰越可爾斯吉普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1562年9月13日在英国維斯特莫藍德洛福黑享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Dorothy Clifford was born in 1512, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Clifford, was 58 and her mother, Florence Pudsey, was 37. She married Hugh Lowther Knt. in 1529, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 September 1562, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Dorothy Clifford est née en 1512, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Clifford, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Florence Pudsey, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Lowther Knt. en 1529, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1562, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Dorothy Clifford 1512 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Clifford 58 und ihre Mutter Florence Pudsey 37. Sie hat 1529 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh Lowther Knt. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. September 1562 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lowther, Westmorland, England und wurde in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Dorothy Clifford è nata il nel 1512 nel Skipton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry Clifford, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Florence Pudsey, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Lowther Knt. nel 1529, nel Skipton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1562, nel Lowther, Westmorland, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Dorothy Cliffordが1512年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Cliffordは58歳，母Florence Pudseyは37歳であった。1529年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンでHugh Lowther Knt.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1562年9月13日にイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Dorothy Clifford(이)가 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Clifford(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence Pudsey(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 Hugh Lowther Knt.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 9월 13일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Dorothy Clifford nasceu em 1512, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Clifford, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Florence Pudsey, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Lowther Knt. em 1529, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1562, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Dorothy Clifford родилась в 1512 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Clifford было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Pudsey, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Lowther Knt. в 1529 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 сентября 1562 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Dorothy Clifford nació en 1512, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Clifford, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Florence Pudsey, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Hugh Lowther Knt. en 1529, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1562, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
